name: Rename tutor to mentor across the product surface
description: Product vocab rule: the AI persona is 'mentor', never 'tutor'. The English source keys in en.json contain 5 'tutor' occurrences (noteSignal cluster lines 1502-1504, mentorMemory title line 3329), and 122 occurrences survive in 7 locale translation files. Additionally the API schema contract uses hasTutorAddition/tutorAdditions field names in packages/schemas/src/concept-mastery.ts which propagates to mobile components and testIDs. The rename must cover copy (user-visible) and — as a deliberate scope call — the schema field names.
acceptanceCriteria:
**Current state:**
- `apps/mobile/src/i18n/en.json` ~5 'tutor' occurrences: `library.noteSignal.*` cluster (:1502-1504), `mentorMemory.title` 'What your tutor knows about you' (:3329). The TOS copy at :1907 ('tutoring' as generic legal term) — LEAVE UNCHANGED (intentional legal generic).
- All 7 locale files inherit the tutor translations; 122 total occurrences must be re-translated. Run `pnpm translate` after en.json update to regenerate locale files.
- `packages/schemas/src/concept-mastery.ts:5-6` — fields `hasTutorAddition`, `tutorAdditions` (API contract); cascades to `apps/api/src/services/concept-mastery.ts`, `apps/mobile/src/components/session/InlineNoteCard.tsx`, `NoteDisplay.tsx` (testIDs: `note-tutor-addition-toggle`), ~8 test files.

**Approach:**
1. Copy sweep: update en.json keys and values. Run `pnpm translate` to regenerate locale files. Run `pnpm check:i18n` to verify no orphaned keys.
2. Schema rename: `hasTutorAddition` → `hasMentorAddition`, `tutorAdditions` → `mentorAdditions` in `packages/schemas/src/concept-mastery.ts`. Cascade to all consumers (TypeScript type errors will surface them). Update testIDs `note-tutor-addition-toggle` → `note-mentor-addition-toggle` in all occurrences.

**Scope boundary:** User-facing strings and the schema contract. Internal code variable names (function names, service internals that never surface to users) are out of scope for this pass unless they're the schema fields causing cascade.

**Verification:** `pnpm exec nx run-many -t typecheck` green. `pnpm check:i18n` passes. `rg -i 'tutor' apps/mobile/src/i18n/en.json | grep -v 'tutoring.*TOS'` should reach 0 after sweep. Tests green.
